text.title: Agent Customer-Zero Pilot Protocol Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply agent-customer-zero-pilot-protocol. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Sign LOI; define ≤3 use cases (r1).
step.description: Input: customer + product. Action: Author scope contract.. Output: scope contract.

step.name: Define numeric success thresholds (r2).
step.description: Input: scope contract. Action: Author thresholds.. Output: thresholds.

step.name: Decide billing model (r4).
step.description: Input: finance + customer. Action: Document.. Output: billing model.

step.name: Wire + test kill switch on day 0 (r3).
step.description: Input: kill switch design. Action: Test e2e.. Output: kill switch verified.
step.note: Step 4. Required input: kill switch design.

step.name: Launch; instrument observability.
step.description: Input: all above. Action: Deploy.. Output: live pilot.

step.name: Week-4 mid-pilot review (r5); week-8 success-gate; week-12 GA-or-sunset.
step.description: Input: live pilot + eval. Action: Run reviews.. Output: GA / sunset decision.
step.note: Step 6. Required input: live pilot + eval.
